name: Nargis Akter
longBio: Nargis Akter is a Professor in the Department of Information and Communication Technology (ICT) at Mawlana Bhashani Science and Technology University (MBSTU). She possesses deep expertise in data science, machine learning, intelligent systems, and computational modeling. In the Agri-VoiceLink project, she serves as a Co-Investigator, leading linguistic corpus curation, acoustic mapping of local dialects, and localized model diagnostics validation.
